docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF S AND C MOTORS INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALLEN, RUTH B. $322.49 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $387.49 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
